subcodes.first_line: O adornment of the assured ones and solace of the seekers, a world is in tumult and ferment, and a universe in intoxication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زین الموقنین و قره عین الطالبین عالمی در جوش و خروش است و جهانی مست و
subcodes.subjects: @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
